findings.evidence: grep -rn 'trace_eq_zero_of_sq_ratCast_of_not_mem_range' code roadmap → only its own definition at Trace.lean:116; roadmap README references trace_eq_zero_of_sq_ratCast only.
findings.fix: Delete the deprecated alias and keep only the renamed theorem trace_eq_zero_of_sq_ratCast.
findings.issue: @[deprecated] alias trace_eq_zero_of_sq_ratCast_of_not_mem_range adds public surface for a name with no consumers (grep finds zero uses in code/ or roadmap/; the roadmap names only trace_eq_zero_of_sq_ratCast). A deprecation cycle is pointless in an internal auto-merging library with no external consumers.

findings.evidence: TraceForm.lean lines 22-27 vs lines 48-60 (file body is two `example`s); both named results are defined in Trace.lean lines 73, 108.
findings.fix: Reword the docstring to state the file only contains worked examples re-using the API from TauCeti.FieldTheory.Trace, not new results.
findings.issue: Module docstring lists trace_eq_zero_of_sq_ratCast and discr_one_self_eq_of_sq under 'Main results', but this file defines no declarations (only examples); both live in Trace.lean. Misleading interface advertised by the file.

summary: The characteristic API is complete and bodies stay hidden, but the PR ships a deprecated alias as dead public surface: the old name it forwards to was renamed in this same PR and has zero consumers in code or roadmap. Drop it and rename outright.
